title: Arterial Polarity Grid: Maximally Decorrelated Signal Schedules
strategies: corridor baseline: arrow plan with column 0 all +1, row 0 all +1, cell (i,i)=-1 for i>=1; |det|=2^(N-1), the minimum non-zero determinant (checker baseline -> 0.1)
seeded multi-restart random search: draw many normalized +/-1 grids and keep the one with the largest exact |det| via Bareiss
restart + sign-flip hill climbing: from the best random grid, greedily flip single signal cells that increase the exact |det|, then renormalize the reference column
row/column orthogonalization heuristics that push toward the unreachable Hadamard bound N^(N/2) without ever attaining it (N is odd)
